overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk Japanese garden during a rainy night. The scene blends traditional wooden walkways, stone lanterns, and pagodas with futuristic holographic billboards and neon lighting. The player character moves through dense vegetation and encounters various NPCs before reaching an open plaza with a traditional gazebo.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow, dark wooden walkway surrounded by dense pine trees in heavy rain. The path is wet and reflective, with wooden railings on both sides. The lighting is very low initially but improves slightly as the path progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with traditional stone lanterns

events.description: passing close by an NPC in plaid shirt leaning on railing, temporarily blocking right side view

agents.ego_description: walking along the path passing a man observing the garden from the railing

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt leaning on wooden railing looking out at the rainy garden below

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern along the left side of the path
wooden pagoda-style structure with curved roof visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the narrow walkway, passing a man in a plaid shirt who is leaning on the railing observing the garden. A stone lantern becomes visible on the left side as the path remains enclosed by dense trees, with the traditional gazebo now visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from narrow path to open plaza with traditional gazebo

events.description: path opens up revealing traditional gazebo and distant holographic billboard beyond the trees
encountering pedestrian with illuminated neon umbrella walking toward camera

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open plaza, passing a person with a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: person carrying a red and purple glowing umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large futuristic holographic advertisement glowing in the distance beyond the garden

segments.scene_description: The narrow path opens into a semi-covered plaza area. A traditional wooden gazebo with red lanterns becomes visible ahead, while a large holographic billboard glows in the distant background. The vegetation thins out as the scene transitions from enclosed walkway to open garden space, and a person with a glowing umbrella passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza under concrete overpass with traditional gazebo

events.description: slowing pace to observe the plaza area and walk around the gazebo

agents.ego_description: walking around the open plaza observing the gazebo and surrounding area with various NPCs

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking past the gazebo
person sitting on bench under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway or rail overpass structure covering the plaza overhead
concrete park benches along the sides of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. The traditional gazebo with red lanterns stands centrally, surrounded by wet stone pavement. Various NPCs walk through the area or sit on benches, while the large holographic billboard remains visible in the background beyond the garden.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, rain-drenched forest path into a wide, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins on a narrow, dark wooden walkway where heavy rain creates reflective surfaces beneath a canopy of dense pine trees. As the camera progresses, the path remains enclosed but the lighting improves, passing a man in a plaid shirt and a traditional stone lantern before the distant silhouette of a gazebo emerges. The scene then opens as the vegetation thins, transitioning from the tight walkway into a semi-covered plaza where a person with a glowing umbrella passes by and a massive holographic billboard begins to glow in the background. Finally, the camera moves fully into the open space beneath a concrete overpass, centering on the red lanterns of the gazebo amidst wet stone pavement and various NPCs.
